name: python3-reportlab
title: python3-reportlab
summary: ReportLab library to create PDF documents using Python3
description:
ReportLab library to create PDF documents using Python3
ReportLab is a library that lets you directly create documents in
Adobe's Portable Document Format (PDF) using the Python programming language.
.
ReportLab library creates PDF based on graphics commands without
intervening steps. It's therefore extremely fast, and flexible (since
you're using a full-blown programming language).
.
Sample use cases are:
* Dynamic PDF generation on the web
* High-volume corporate reporting and database publishing
* As embeddable print engine for other applications, including a
'report language' so that users can customize their own reports.
* As 'build system' for complex documents with charts, tables and text
such as management accounts, statistical reports and scientific papers
* from XML to PDF in one step
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-reportlab because ReportLab library to create PDF documents using Python3.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-reportlab as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-reportlab with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-reportlab --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
